info.title: EVEZ Autoenveloper
info.description: Multi-basis structural invariant detector + spacetime operators. Fingerprints any sequence with compression, mutual information, spectral gap, and persistence entropy. Cross-domain isomorphism detection, Ricci flow, entropy fields, gradient tunneling, context horizons, cipher generation, geometric analysis, linguistic profiling.

post.summary: Compute structural similarity between two domains
post.description: Uses Φ(x)=[C(x), I₁..I₅(x), λ₂(x), Hₚ(x)] fingerprint. S(x,y)=√(cos(Φx,Φy)·(1-JS(Φx,Φy))). Works across code, finance, biology, language, math. Detects shared generative grammar regardless of surface vocabulary.

200.description: Similarity score [0-1] + fingerprint vectors + breakdown by component

post.summary: Apply Ricci curvature flow to embedding vectors
post.description: Discrete Ollivier-Ricci flow on embedding neighborhood graph. Redistributes curvature so overloaded semantic regions flatten, sparse regions contract. Implements Semantic Ricci Flow (SRF).

post.summary: Compute local entropy tensor over a sequence
post.description: Returns H(t) field over windowed regions: high-entropy = creative/inflationary, low-entropy = precise/contractionary. Backs Semantic Inflation Fields (SIF).

200.description: Entropy field + inflation mask + region labels

post.summary: Inject resonance noise to escape flat loss basins
post.description: Gradient Tunneling Resonance (GTR): stochastic resonance noise tuned to local Hessian eigenvalues. Forces escape from flat loss regions.

200.description: Perturbed surface + escape path + energy delta

post.summary: Context event horizon — Hawking radiation encoding
post.description: Bifurcates a sequence at the context window boundary. Tokens beyond the horizon become Hawking radiation: a compressed entropy signature preserving the thermodynamic footprint of lost context.

200.description: Interior state + radiation vector + bifurcation phase

post.summary: Cipher generation, fractal sequences, and cross-domain isomorphism
post.description: Modes: substitution, polyalphabetic, transposition, lsystem (sierpinski/koch/dragon/plant), numeric (Collatz/logistic/fibonacci), isomorphism (structural similarity via compression+MI+spectral+entropy).

200.description: Generated cipher, sequence, fractal, or similarity result

post.summary: Geometric analysis: fractal dimension, spectral, symmetry, hull, centroid
post.description: Modes: fractal (box-counting), spectral (DFT), symmetry (Cn rotational — identifies C2/C3/C6), hull (convex hull area), centroid.

200.description: Dimension, spectrum, symmetry class, area, or centroid

post.summary: Linguistic analysis: n-gram profiles, authorship fingerprinting, PII anonymization
post.description: Modes: ngram (n-gram frequency profile), authorship (stylometric fingerprinting), anonymize (PII detection+pseudonymization: email, phone, IP, name, hash).

200.description: N-gram profile, authorship vector, or anonymized text
